flashcards.front: What is the primary function of a text search application?
flashcards.back: To search for a given pattern in a text

flashcards.front: What type of finite automaton is used to model the text search application?
What is the purpose of epsilon-transitions in finite automata?
flashcards.back: To allow for transitions without consuming any input

flashcards.front: What is the difference between a DFA and an NFA?
flashcards.back: A DFA is deterministic, while an NFA is nondeterministic

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the transition function in a finite automaton?
flashcards.back: To define the next state based on the current state and input
